name: Model Training Pipeline
description: A model training pipeline manages the end-to-end fit: data is split into train, validation, and test, parameters initialized, and the model trained over mini-batches while monitoring training and validation loss; regularization counters overfitting and the best checkpoint is kept once validation converges, yielding the trained model.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Training data + model"]
    N2["Split train/val/test"]
    N3["Initialize parameters"]
    N4["Train on mini-batches"]
    N5["Compute training loss"]
    N6["Evaluate on validation"]
    N7{"Overfitting?"}
    N8["Regularize / augment"]
    N9{"Converged?"}
    N10["Checkpoint best model"]
    N11["Trained model"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N8 -->|retrain| N4
    N7 -->|no| N9
    N9 -->|no| N4
    N9 -->|yes| N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Deep Learning
sources.authors: Goodfellow, I.; Bengio, Y.; Courville, A.
